data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. PIPPA has found the minor placings here at last couple of runs, finishing third last time beaten 3 lengths (18.01). Overdue and expected to feature again. 4. OCEAN'S PEARL has a strong record this track and trip with six wins and four placings from 17 starts. Placed last time (17.58) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 6 lengths. Looks a key chance on best figures. 2. DEADLY TALENT has a strong overall record having five wins and nine places from 21 starts but was out of the money last time when sixth (17.49) over 300m at Casino. Best form too dangerous to ignore. Have to include. 8. REMISSION RUN put a gap on his rivals last start. Sure to run well again.","runners":[1,4,2,8],"exclusive":false}
